import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  let m = result.len()
  let count = nums.len()
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    let x = match nums.get(k)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let rlen = result.len()
    if rlen == 0
      result = list.push(result, x)
    else
      let last = match result.get(rlen - 1)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if last == x
        result = result
      else
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut p = 0
  let total = result.len()
  while p < total
    let x = match result.get(p)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if p == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    p = p + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
